title: Tyler's (TYL) Payment Solution Selected by Harris County
text: Tyler's (TYL) digital payment software - Tyler Disbursements - is likely to provide Harris County with a hassle-free solution to pay jurors accurately and on time.

title: Harris County, Texas, Implements Digital Disbursements for Jurors with Tyler Technologies' Solution
text: PLANO, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $TYL #TylerTech--Tyler Technologies announced that Harris County in Texas has successfully gone live with Tyler Disbursements.

title: Tyler Technologies to Provide Electronic Vehicle Titling and Liens for the State of Kentucky
text: PLANO, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $TYL #TylerTech--Tyler Technologies has signed an agreement with the Kentucky Transportation Cabinet to implement Tyler's electronic solutions for vehicle titling.

title: Tyler Technologies to Provide Enterprise Justice Solution Suite to Licking County, Ohio
text: PLANO, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $TYL #TylerTech--Tyler Technologies has signed an agreement with Licking County, Ohio, for Tyler's Enterprise Justice software suite.

title: Tyler Technologies: Recommending Buy Rating Based On Strong Demand Trend
text: TYL is a major provider of integrated information management solutions for the public sector. The company's revenue and operating margin have exceeded 2Q23 expectations, driven by growth in SaaS and subscription revenue. Tyler Technologies is well-positioned for future growth, with strong demand, a healthy deal flow, and a successful transition to cloud-based solutions.
